skincare: Use a gentle foaming cleanser twice daily.
Avoid oily skincare and comedogenic products.
Incorporate salicylic acid or benzoyl peroxide treatment.
medication: Consult a dermatologist about topical retinoids.
Oral antibiotics may be prescribed for severe acne.

skincare: Take lukewarm showers, avoid hot water.
Wear cotton clothing to reduce irritation.
Avoid alcohol, spicy foods, and hot drinks.
Use gentle cleansers and mineral sunscreens.
medication: Topical metronidazole or azelaic acid may help.
Oral doxycycline may be prescribed for severe cases.

skincare: Use products with niacinamide or vitamin C.
medication: Topical hydroquinone or retinoids may be prescribed.
Chemical peels may be considered under supervision.

skincare: Maintain a balanced routine with cleanser, moisturizer, sunscreen.
Stay hydrated and eat a nutrient-rich diet.
